title: echinops viscosus subsp. bithynicus
intro: Echinops viscosus subsp. bithynicus, also known as the sticky globe thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the eastern Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and expectorant effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Echinops viscosus subsp. bithynicus include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and help reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or syrup, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to alleviate respiratory and gastrointestinal symptoms.
